posts.title: Welcome to the EAZYOO Blog
posts.excerpt: We are excited to launch our new blog where we will share updates, tips, and news about our products.
posts.content:
Welcome to the EAZYOO Blog! We are thrilled to have you here.

We will be using this space to share our latest product updates, tips and tricks for using our collapsible gear, and news about our brand.

Stay tuned for more updates!

posts.title: 5 Reasons Why Collapsible Products Will Change Your Life
posts.excerpt: From saving kitchen space to making outdoor adventures easier, collapsible products are the smart choice for modern living.
posts.content:
In today's fast-paced world, space and efficiency matter more than ever. That's why collapsible products have become a game-changer for households and outdoor enthusiasts alike.

1. Save Valuable Kitchen Space

Our Collapsible Cutting Board folds completely flat, slipping into even the tightest kitchen drawer. No more bulky boards cluttering your countertops.

2. Perfect for Travel and Adventures

The Running Water Bottle collapses when empty, taking up virtually no space in your backpack. Whether you're hiking, cycling, or at the gym — it's always ready.

3. Reduce Clutter at Home

Collapsible products stack, fold, and store neatly. Your home feels more organised and spacious with minimal effort.

4. Durable and Long-Lasting

Our products are made from food-grade silicone and high-quality materials designed to withstand everyday use — without the wear that traditional rigid products suffer.

5. Eco-Friendly Choice

By investing in durable, reusable collapsible products, you reduce reliance on single-use items — better for your wallet and the planet.

Browse our full range →

posts.title: EAZYOO Running Water Bottle — Now Available on Amazon UK
posts.excerpt: Our bestselling 500ml collapsible running water bottle is now live on Amazon UK with Prime delivery. Here's everything you need to know.
posts.content:
We are proud to announce that our Running Water Bottle is now officially live on Amazon UK with Prime delivery available.

This 500ml soft flask is designed for runners, cyclists, hikers, and gym-goers who refuse to compromise on hydration — without the bulk of a traditional water bottle.

Key Features

  • ✅ Folds completely flat when empty
  • ✅ BPA-free food-grade material
  • ✅ Leakproof screw cap
  • ✅ Fits in running belt, vest pockets, and bike bottle cages
  • ✅ Pack of 2 — in two colours

Customer Reviews

Since launch, we've received hundreds of 5-star reviews. Customers love the quality, the compact design, and the value of getting 2 bottles in one pack.

Buy on Amazon UK →

posts.title: How to Apply for EAZYOO Wholesale
posts.excerpt: Are you a retailer, gym owner, or online seller? Here's a step-by-step guide to becoming an EAZYOO stockist.
posts.content:
We welcome wholesale applications from all types of businesses — from small boutique shops to large online retailers. Here's how to get started:

Step 1: Check If You Qualify

We work with gyms, sports shops, kitchen stores, pet stores, online retailers, and more. If you have a business that sells consumer products, we want to hear from you.

Step 2: Submit Your Application

Visit our Wholesale page and fill in the application form. Tell us about your business, monthly volume, and which products you're interested in.

Step 3: We'll Be in Touch Within 48 Hours

Our team reviews every application personally. We'll respond with your customised wholesale pricing sheet and minimum order quantities.

Our Wholesale Benefits

  • 📦 Low MOQ — minimum orders start from 20 units per SKU
  • 💰 Up to 45% off retail price
  • 🚚 UK warehouse — fast dispatch
  • 🤝 Dedicated wholesale support

Ready to get started? Apply Now →

posts.title: Top 8 Garden Gadgets for a Smarter Garden This Summer
posts.excerpt: Summer is here and it's time to upgrade your garden setup. We've rounded up our top 8 must-have garden accessories from the EAZYOO range.
posts.content:
Summer is the perfect time to invest in your garden. Whether you're a seasoned green thumb or just starting out, these smart accessories will make garden life easier and more enjoyable.

1. Memory Foam Garden Kneeling Pad

Protect your knees while weeding, planting, and pruning. Our waterproof kneeling pad is lightweight and wipes clean after every use.

2. Solar Garden Path Lights

Illuminate your pathways without any wiring. Our solar LED lights charge by day and glow all night — with an IP65 waterproof rating.

3. Expandable Garden Hose

Our 50ft expandable hose is lightweight and kink-free, expanding 3x its size when in use and shrinking back when finished.

4. Collapsible Garden Waste Bag

Self-standing and 120L capacity — this pop-up garden bag holds everything from leaves to grass cuttings, then folds flat for storage.

5. Self-Watering Plant Globes

Going on holiday? Let these glass globes slowly water your indoor plants for up to 2 weeks.

Shop All Garden Products →
